_comment: Public ATS job feeds to import via POST /api/ats/import (or `python -m app.services.ats_import`). Set enabled:true to include a company. 'ats' is 'greenhouse' or 'lever'. 'slug' is the Greenhouse board token or the Lever company slug — the part in the public board URL, e.g. https://boards.greenhouse.io/<token> or https://jobs.lever.co/<slug>. Sample entries below are real public boards but left DISABLED.
